target: 4. Returning Home
July 24
Huh… I made it back safely…
Ah…

(There was almost no sign of people when I came back here)
(To be honest, I only heard a voice that might have been a Shadow)
(But I heard a voice that might have been a Shadow…)
(What if everyone around here has already been turned into a Shadow?)
(…I hope that's not the case.)
Dad, I'm home!

Ah, you're back.
You came back earlier than expected, but
how was the festival?
That's not even a concern!

Alain, you're safe!
That's good…

Safe? What are you talking about?
Did something happen?
Dad, you don't even know what's going on outside!?

No, I was cleaning up the shop and preparing for tomorrow,
so I haven't been paying attention to what's going on outside.
This isn't the time to be so laid back!

(Given the situation, there doesn't seem to have been any major commotion nearby.
It's probably safe to think that way.)
(Regardless, I'm really glad Alain is safe…)

Shinpei, what's this commotion about?
Did an accident happen at the festival?

…Alain.
I'll summarize quickly, so listen carefully.
Ah, right.
That's the situation.
So… I guess I didn't really understand it.
That there are terrifying monsters all over the island, so we need to escape?
Yeah, that's it!

But…
I can't really believe something like that.
"It's not a joke!"
"I'll have to drag you out by force!"

It's not a joke!
I'm telling the truth!
No, Shinpei wouldn't lie about something like this, and I think it's probably true.
It's just so huge… I can't even begin to imagine the tragedy.
I never thought something like this would happen on this island…

I'll have to drag you out by force!
There's no time!
We can talk later, okay?
Shin-chan, are you serious?

I am.
Alain will understand later.

I see.
If Shinpei says that, it must be an emergency.

Then get ready immediately!
We need to take the last ferry!
Well, don't get so worked up.

First, let everyone calm down.
Have something warm to drink.

Alain!!!
Did you even hear what I just said?!
I've told you so many times that we don't have time---
The last ferry today isn't for a while, right?
Huh…?
Oh, right!

Shin-chan, today's the festival.
The ferry is running more frequently than usual.
…Oh!

(Why did I forget…?
Today's the festival, so there's a <color=#GF_TIPS_116>temporary schedule</color> for tourists!)

Normally we'd have to hurry, but since the last ferry isn't for a while,
we still have some time.

You must have been so scared you lost your head.
Anyway, let's calm down.
If we rush out, the monsters outside might find us.
That might be true, but if we miss the ferry…

I understand how you feel.
But "haste makes waste."
Let's just calm down for now.
Well… if Alain says so.

Hahaha!
I've never seen Shinpei so flustered before.

You're so calm, Alain.
But thanks to that, I've calmed down too.

While we wait for a call from the window,
let's rest here for a while.
Yeah, I'm fine with that.

Then, let's have our last order.
What will you two have?
Huh? You mean drinks?

Of course.
A warm drink is the best for the soul.
Then I'll have milk tea.
Then I'll put as much milk and sugar as I can.
What about you, Shinpei?
Hmm, coffee.

Got it.
I'll use my best beans.
You have that kind of stuff?

It's the usual beans.
I always keep the best ones on hand.
It's all in how you say it.

(At last… I feel like I've regained a little bit of composure.
Thanks to Alain.)
How's your calmness?
Yeah, thanks, Alain.

No call yet.
…From Tokiko too, and from Sou.
Did you get separated from those two?

Yeah…
When we were running away, it got so chaotic.
Shin-chan, I'll email Tokiko too to tell them to come here.
No, since we plan to escape by ferry, you should tell them to head to the port.
If they're closer to the port than here, it'll be a waste of time.
Oh, right.
We can meet at the port, or even on the mainland.
Well, I'll go to the bathroom before we move.
Dad, you're so calm in this situation.
Haha…
My phone hasn't even received any calls…
(Where are you, Sou, Tokiko…)
…Hey, Shin-chan.
What?
I wonder what's going to happen to us?
I don't want anyone else to become like my sister again.
I wonder if Tokiko and Sou are okay…
Maybe they're already…
Mio, you're overthinking.

Ah… sorry.
I shouldn't have said that.

It'll be okay.
I'll protect Mio.
…Thank you.

Hey, Shin-chan.
Can I ask you something weird?
Weird?
Um, is it okay if I change clothes?
Changing clothes?

This outfit is really hard to move in.
I think I'd be better off in regular clothes.
Ah, you're right.
But why ask me specifically?
Because…
I think Shin-chan likes this kimono.
…What!?

Was it not obvious?
I felt like you were looking at me more than usual during the festival.

S-so was that the case?
I don't think I was paying special attention…

S-sorry! I shouldn't have said that!
I'll go change right away!
(Did I really look that much?)

(I feel kind of awkward.
Maybe I should clean up the cups.)

(Even if we're escaping from here,
leaving it like this doesn't feel right.)
…What!?
(On the kitchen floor… a black stain in the shape of a person…)
No way…
(I can't believe it. I want to think it's a mistake, but it's definitely not.)
(This is the mark left when a Shadow copies a person!)
(If someone was copied here… there's only one person I can think of.)
Damn…!
Huh? Whoa! Who is it?!

It's me.
Mio, have you changed yet?
Not yet…

Shin-chan, something happened?
Why are you looking so scared?

Shh… don't make a loud noise.
Get out of here soon.

Huh, why?
Why the sudden change?

The Alain earlier was a shadow.
If we stay here, it's dangerous.
